from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ''/Users/jaydenl/Dev/Hackathon/cornellhealthhack/server'')

from google import genai
import os

client = genai.Client(api_key=os.environ.get(''GOOGLE_API_KEY''))

prompt = ''''''Your voice has jitter of 1.85% and shimmer of 4.23%. Return JSON: 
{
  ""summary"": ""Explain these measurements in 1-2 sentences"",
  ""details"": ""Explain in detail what these measurements mean""
}''''''

response = client.models.generate_content(
    model=''models/gemini-2.5-flash'',
    contents=prompt,
    config={
        ''max_output_tokens'': 1000,
        ''temperature'': 0.7,
        ''response_mime_type'': ''application/json''
    }
)

print(''Finish reason:'', response.candidates[0].finish_reason if response.candidates else ''None'')
print(''Text length:'', len(response.text))
print(''Text:'', response.text)
")
